title: File upload as trigger in Zapier
excerpt:
Hello! 
I am trying to use zapier to when a file is uploaded to monday it’ll trigger something in zapier (renaming file then saving it to a google drive). I set up a board with 3 columns that are file upload columns. But…

posts.author: jpelrman87 (Josh Perlman)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello!

I am trying to use zapier to when a file is uploaded to monday it’ll trigger something in zapier (renaming file then saving it to a google drive). I set up a board with 3 columns that are file upload columns. But when i go to Zapier those columns dont appear as a trigger. But when i have a not add a file column those show up in zapier…

any help making this work would be appreciated.

posts.author: jpelrman87 (Josh Perlman)
posts.cookedHtml:
This could work for us.

Can we use rules and automations to direct files to different folders based on tags in the item?

Josh Perlman
203-253-6895

posts.author: allan735 (allan berner)
posts.cookedHtml: Zapier’s monday.com integration primarily triggers on item property changes, not directly on file uploads. Workarounds include using the “Any Column Value Changed” trigger Receiptify Music with filters to detect file uploads, or the “New Item Created” trigger with subsequent checks. Explore monday.com’s native integrations for potential alternatives.
